sentences.text_original: 你上个月去哪儿旅行了？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shàng ge yuè qù nǎr lǚ xíng le?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Куда ты ездил путешествовать в прошлом месяце?
sentences.text_translation_en: Where did you travel last month?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我去了上海。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ qù le Shàng hǎi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я ездил в Шанхай.
sentences.text_translation_en: I went to Shanghai.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 上海好玩吗？
sentences.pinyin: Shàng hǎi hǎo wán ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: В Шанхае было интересно?
sentences.text_translation_en: Was Shanghai fun?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很好玩！我去了外滩和东方明珠塔。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn hǎo wán! Wǒ qù le Wài tān hé Dōng fāng Míng zhū Tǎ.
sentences.text_translation: Juda qiziqarli! Vaytan va "Sharq marvaridi" minorasiga bordim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень интересно! Я был на Вайтане и у телебашни «Восточная жемчужина».
sentences.text_translation_en: Very fun! I went to the Bund and the Oriental Pearl Tower.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你一个人去的吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yí ge rén qù de ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты ездил один?
sentences.text_translation_en: Did you go by yourself?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不是。我和朋友一起去的。
sentences.pinyin: Bú shì. Wǒ hé péng you yì qǐ qù de.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нет. Я ездил вместе с другом.
sentences.text_translation_en: No. I went together with a friend.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你们怎么去的？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ men zěn me qù de?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как вы добрались?
sentences.text_translation_en: How did you get there?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我们坐高铁去的。很快，只要四个小时。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men zuò gāo tiě qù de. Hěn kuài, zhǐ yào sì ge xiǎo shí.
sentences.text_translation: Tezyurar poyezdda bordik. Juda tez, atigi to'rt soat.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Мы ехали на высокоскоростном поезде. Очень быстро, всего четыре часа.
sentences.text_translation_en: We took the high-speed rail. It's fast, only four hours.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你们住了几天？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ men zhù le jǐ tiān?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько дней вы там были?
sentences.text_translation_en: How many days did you stay?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 住了三天。我们住在一家小酒店。
sentences.pinyin: Zhù le sān tiān. Wǒ men zhù zài yì jiā xiǎo jiǔ diàn.
sentences.text_translation: Uch kun turdik. Biz kichik mehmonxonada turdik.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Мы пробыли три дня. Мы жили в небольшом отеле.
sentences.text_translation_en: We stayed three days. We stayed at a small hotel.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 酒店贵不贵？
sentences.pinyin: Jiǔ diàn guì bu guì?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отель дорогой?
sentences.text_translation_en: Was the hotel expensive?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不贵。一晚上两百块，还包早餐。
sentences.pinyin: Bú guì. Yì wǎn shang liǎng bǎi kuài, hái bāo zǎo cān.
sentences.text_translation: Qimmat emas. Bir kechasi ikki yuz yuan, nonushta ham kiradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не дорогой. Двести юаней за ночь, и завтрак включён.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not expensive. Two hundred yuan a night, and breakfast is included.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你们吃了什么好吃的？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ men chī le shén me hǎo chī de?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что вкусного вы поели?
sentences.text_translation_en: What good food did you eat?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 吃了很多上海小吃，小笼包最好吃！
sentences.pinyin: Chī le hěn duō Shàng hǎi xiǎo chī, xiǎo lóng bāo zuì hǎo chī!
sentences.text_translation: Ko'p Shanxay gazaklaridan yedik, eng mazasi xiaolungbao edi!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Мы поели много шанхайских закусок, сяолунбао самые вкусные!
sentences.text_translation_en: We ate lots of Shanghai snacks; the xiaolongbao were the best!
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你们去购物了吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ men qù gòu wù le ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вы ходили по магазинам?
sentences.text_translation_en: Did you go shopping?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 去了。我买了一些礼物送给家人。
sentences.pinyin: Qù le. Wǒ mǎi le yì xiē lǐ wù sòng gěi jiā rén.
sentences.text_translation: Bordik. Oilamga bir nechta sovg'a sotib oldim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ходили. Я купил несколько подарков для семьи.
sentences.text_translation_en: We did. I bought some gifts for my family.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 下次旅行，你打算去哪儿？
sentences.pinyin: Xià cì lǚ xíng, nǐ dǎ suàn qù nǎr?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Куда ты планируешь поехать в следующий раз?
sentences.text_translation_en: Where do you plan to go on your next trip?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我想去北京看故宫。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng qù Běi jīng kàn Gù gōng.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я хочу поехать в Пекин и посмотреть Гугун.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to go to Beijing to see the Forbidden City.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我也想去！我们可以一起去。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xiǎng qù! Wǒ men kě yǐ yì qǐ qù.
sentences.text_translation: Men ham bormoqchiman! Birga borsak bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже хочу! Мы можем поехать вместе.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'd like to go too! We can go together.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 太好了！我们夏天去吧。
sentences.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Wǒ men xià tiān qù ba.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично! Давай поедем летом.
sentences.text_translation_en: Great! Let's go in the summer.
sentences.speaker: B
